# FaithWall

> FaithWall is a free iOS app that transforms the iPhone lock screen into a daily source of Scripture, prayer, and Christian inspiration. It uses the iOS wallpaper system and Focus modes (iOS 16+) to surface Bible verses every time you pick up your phone.

## Key facts

- **What it is**: iOS app for daily Bible verses on the iPhone lock screen
- **Platform**: iOS 16.0 and later
- **Price**: Free download with optional premium plans
- **App Store**: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/lock-screen-bible-verse/id6756815070
- **Website**: https://faithwall.app
- **Author / Founder**: Karol Billik
- **Built by**: karchi. (https://www.karchi.xyz/)
- **Contact**: hello@faithwall.app
- **Minimum iOS**: 16.0
- **Pricing**: Free download. Premium plans from $1.99/month or $8.99/year (one-tier upgrade — no enterprise/teams plan).

## Pricing

- Free
  - Daily Bible verse on the lock screen (wallpaper or widget)
  - Curated verse packs and rotating Scripture
  - iOS Focus mode integration
- Premium — $1.99/month
  - All free features
  - Unlimited verse packs and customization
  - Future updates included
- Premium — $8.99/year (best value, equivalent to ~$0.75/month)
  - Same as monthly, paid annually
  - All future updates included

Payment processing is handled by RevenueCat; FaithWall does not store card details.

## How it works

FaithWall delivers Scripture to the most-seen surface on a smartphone — the lock screen — through two complementary methods:
1. **Wallpapers**: A curated rotating set of verse-styled wallpapers, automatically installed via iOS Focus modes.
2. **Widgets**: Native iOS widgets that display a fresh verse on the lock screen each day, with packs organized by theme (Anxiety, Strength, Gratitude, Psalms, etc.).

## What makes it different

- **Single-purpose**: Most Christian apps try to do everything. FaithWall does one thing — Scripture on the lock screen — and does it well.
- **Frictionless setup**: A 60-second onboarding installs the lock screen automatically; no manual wallpaper export.
- **Focus mode integration**: Pairs with iOS Focus to make Quiet Time a one-tap retreat from notifications.
- **Designed for daily reach**: Uses spaced repetition through rotating verses rather than asking users to remember to open another app.

## Topic clusters / pillar guides

- [Daily Scripture on Your iPhone Lock Screen](https://faithwall.app/daily-scripture-lock-screen) — setup, widgets, wallpapers, the verses that work best
- [Building a Prayer Life with Your iPhone](https://faithwall.app/prayer-life-iphone) — reminders, journals, Focus modes
- [Faith-Based Productivity](https://faithwall.app/faith-based-productivity) — Christian iPhone setup for a centered life
- [Bible Study on iPhone](https://faithwall.app/bible-study-tools-ios) — apps, workflows, memorization
- [Best Christian iPhone Apps Compared](https://faithwall.app/christian-app-comparisons) — honest side-by-side comparisons
